SEARCH
Package org.ddolib.common.solver.stopcriterion

Interface StopCriterion

All Superinterfaces:
Predicate<SearchStatistics>
All Known Subinterfaces:
AstarStopCriterion, DdoStopCriterion
Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public interface StopCriterion extends Predicate<SearchStatistics>
Interface representing a criterion to stop the search process in a solver.

A StopCriterion is a Predicate that takes SearchStatistics as input and returns true if the search should be terminated.

  • Method Summary

    Static Methods
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static StopCriterion
    maxFrontierSize(int maxNodes)
    Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search when the frontier size exceeds a specified limit.
    static StopCriterion
    maxIter(int maxIter)
    Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search when the number of iterations exceeds a specified limit.
    static StopCriterion
    maxIterSinceLastImprovement(int maxIter)
    Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search if no improvement has been found for a certain number of iterations.
    static StopCriterion
    maxIterWithoutGapImprovement(int maxIter)
    Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search when the number of iterations without any gap improvement exceeds a specified limit.
    static StopCriterion
    maxTime(long maxTimeMs)
    Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search when the total runtime exceeds a specified limit.
    static StopCriterion
    maxTimeSinceLastImprovement(long maxTimeMs)
    Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search if no improvement has been found for a certain amount of time.
    static StopCriterion
    minGap(double gapPercent)
    Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search when the optimality gap is less than or equal to a specified threshold.
    static StopCriterion
    minRelativeImprovement(double threshold)
    Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search when the relative improvement between the current incumbent and the previous incumbent is less than or equal to a threshold.

    Methods inherited from interface java.util.function.Predicate

    and, negate, or, test

  • Method Details

    • maxTime

      static StopCriterion maxTime(long maxTimeMs)
      Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search when the total runtime exceeds a specified limit.
      Parameters:
      maxTimeMs - the maximum allowed runtime in milliseconds
      Returns:
      a StopCriterion for maximum runtime

    • maxIter

      static StopCriterion maxIter(int maxIter)
      Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search when the number of iterations exceeds a specified limit.
      Parameters:
      maxIter - the maximum allowed number of iterations
      Returns:
      a StopCriterion for maximum iterations

    • maxTimeSinceLastImprovement

      static StopCriterion maxTimeSinceLastImprovement(long maxTimeMs)
      Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search if no improvement has been found for a certain amount of time.
      Parameters:
      maxTimeMs - the maximum allowed time since the last improvement (in milliseconds)
      Returns:
      a StopCriterion based on time since last improvement

    • maxIterSinceLastImprovement

      static StopCriterion maxIterSinceLastImprovement(int maxIter)
      Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search if no improvement has been found for a certain number of iterations.
      Parameters:
      maxIter - the maximum allowed number of iterations since the last improvement
      Returns:
      a StopCriterion based on iterations since last improvement

    • minRelativeImprovement

      static StopCriterion minRelativeImprovement(double threshold)
      Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search when the relative improvement between the current incumbent and the previous incumbent is less than or equal to a threshold.
      Parameters:
      threshold - the minimum relative improvement required to continue the search in percent
      Returns:
      a StopCriterion based on the relative improvement

    • minGap

      static StopCriterion minGap(double gapPercent)
      Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search when the optimality gap is less than or equal to a specified threshold.
      Parameters:
      gapPercent - the maximum allowed optimality gap in percent
      Returns:
      a StopCriterion for minimum optimality gap

    • maxFrontierSize

      static StopCriterion maxFrontierSize(int maxNodes)
      Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search when the frontier size exceeds a specified limit.
      Parameters:
      maxNodes - the maximum allowed size of the frontier
      Returns:
      a StopCriterion for maximum frontier size

    • maxIterWithoutGapImprovement

      static StopCriterion maxIterWithoutGapImprovement(int maxIter)
      Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search when the number of iterations without any gap improvement exceeds a specified limit.
      Parameters:
      maxIter - the maximum allowed number of iterations since the last gap improvement
      Returns:
      a StopCriterion based on iterations since last gap improvement
